summary: Implemented minimal native-operable business admin config center v1 by extending sc.dictionary with config types/fields and adding three config menus/actions under config center.
risk_notes: Used existing model+ACL path to avoid security/manifest high-risk changes.
Dedicated model migration can be evaluated in a future batch if stronger constraints are needed.
next_step: Run native operability verify for menu reachability and create/save flow with config-admin role.
